title: lachemilla mutellina
intro: Lachemilla mutellina, also known as round-leaved deadnettle, is a perennial plant species in the family roselaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's extracts have been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Lachemilla mutellina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
